codeReview.summary: The worker_pool.rs implementation fully satisfies the feature requirements. It implements a bounded worker pool with 3-5 workers controlled by a semaphore for concurrency management.

summary: Feature orch-worker-pool passes review. Implementation provides: (1) Bounded worker pool with MIN_WORKERS=3, MAX_WORKERS=5, DEFAULT_WORKER_COUNT=4; (2) Semaphore-controlled concurrency using tokio::sync::Semaphore with acquire() (async) and try_acquire() (non-blocking) methods; (3) Complete worker lifecycle management with WorkerState enum (Idle, Busy, ShuttingDown, Stopped) and Worker struct with assign_task(), release(), start_shutdown(), stop() methods; (4) Comprehensive test suite covering creation, acquire/release, task tracking, errors, shutdown, concurrency, and stats. The implementation correctly enforces the 3-5 worker bounds via constructor validation and provides proper concurrency control through semaphore permits.
